svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: FMEA アウトプット活用フロー（RPN ランキング → 4 アクションへの反映）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 64px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 分析結果を設計・運用に反映しないと「レポート作って終わり」になる。RPN ランキングから 4 アクションへの具体反映経路を固定化する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 140px; margin-left: 561px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
主要 10 故障モード（FMEA-001〜010）
S（重要度） × O（発生頻度） × D（検知容易性）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 501px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
RPN ランキング
RPN >= 100: 対策計画必達 / 60-99: 推奨 / 30-59: 優先 / <30: 通常

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1. Runbook 優先順位決定

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: RPN 30 以上の全故障モードに対し Runbook 整備。リリース時点までに 15 本を NFR-A-REC-002 として固定化。各 FMEA エントリ「対応策」欄に Runbook ID を必須記載し、CI（scripts/traceability/fmea_runbook_check.py）で整合検証。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 2. 監視アラート追加（D 低減）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 432px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 検知容易性 D=4 以上（検知困難）の故障モードに対し、Prometheus Alertmanager へ新規ルールを追加。Grafana Tempo / Loki / Pyroscope の 4 スタックで補完し、D スコアを 2 以下に改善。RPN を構造的に低減する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 781px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 3. 冗長化 / HA 投資判断（O 低減）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 792px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 発生頻度 O=4 以上の故障モードに対し、Raft 3 ノード構成 / StatefulSet レプリカ増 / マルチ AZ 配置で冗長化。投資対効果は （RPN 低減量 × SLA 違反コスト）で算出し、Product Council で承認する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 1141px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 4. Chaos Drill シナリオ導出

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 1152px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: RPN 上位故障モードを Chaos Mesh で意図的に注入し、Runbook が機能するかを四半期 Drill で検証。Stress + Chaos 統合試験（DS-OPS-LOAD-012）と連動し、3 分以内の復旧を合格基準とする。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 715px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Argo Rollouts Canary 反映
Runbook 改訂時は Canary デプロイで段階展開し、本番影響を最小化

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 715px; margin-left: 821px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
モニタリング実装 & リグレッション検出
新規アラートと Grafana ダッシュボードを リリース時点までに本番適用

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 918px; height: 1px; padding-top: 870px; margin-left: 301px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
四半期レビュー（Product Council）
SEV1 / SEV2 インシデント後のポストモーテム PR で O / D スコアを実測値更新、RPN 100 超の新規検出を承認
